text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch, it's no use. I can't concentrate at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've thought up a new algorithm, but I just can't
bring myself to flesh it out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I realize that it's most efficient to just do the work
regardless of my motivation. I know that, and yet,
I just...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. I'll just jot the idea down for now
and crunch the numbers tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the fatigue from Air Shakur's
back-to-back races is catching up to her. This
might call for some adjustments to her race
schedule.
